prompts:
/plan "in the plugin app, we are able to open the facebook page to create a draft and set the 'Home for Sale or Rent' combobox properly. However once that is done, the other controls don't get set. For example, we set the property type as 'Rent' for a rental, then the next value that needs to get set is the 'Rental type' combobox. We also have code that chooses branching based on the property type. Here is the facebook page console log for the extension to help us solve the issue :  [RoleFormFinder] Debug functions available: propflowDebugForm(), propflowTestForm()
